user.title: Prayer Times — Google Sheet
user.description: Paste the published Google Sheet URL. It must be published to the web (File → Share → Publish to web).

data.date_format: Date format used in the sheet

date_column.title: Date Column
date_column.description: Which column in your sheet contains the date?

map_prayers.title: Map Prayer Columns
map_prayers.description: Match each prayer/time to its column in the sheet. Leave as '__none__' if the prayer is not in your sheet.

select_prayers.title: Enable Prayers
select_prayers.description: Choose which prayers to create sensors for in Home Assistant.

error.invalid_url: Could not parse a valid Google Sheet URL. Make sure it is published to the web.
error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the sheet. Check the URL and your internet connection.
error.empty_sheet: The sheet appears to be empty or has no headers.

init.title: Update Enabled Prayers
init.description: Toggle which prayers are active as HA sensors.
